reviews.title: Dies in 2 hours
reviews.text: I have had this speaker for about a year and just got around to opening it up. I was excited to take this to the beach with me and was disappointed when I did. I fully charged the speaker and it died in 2 hours. I charged it again that night and tried again the next day and still the same results. I also noticed that when I disconnected and reconnected my bluetooth to the speaker, the battery percentage of the speaker would constantly change. Maybe I ended up with a defective speaker.

reviews.title: Great size works great!
reviews.text: I use this to listen to books on my phone while working outside. Boosts volume so I can hear as I am working. Great size, easy to clip to a belt. I also take this with me when traveling. It fits easily into my bag and can be used as a speaker at the beach. Sound quality is pretty good, not the best but certainly good enough for the beach especially since I don’t have to worry about it being damaged by sand or water. I’ve been using this for 2 years and it’s still going strong.
reviews.author: Overlook

reviews.title: Okay for what it is
reviews.text: I used this speaker to listen to music in the shower. It did the job, but the sound becomes very tinny if you turn it up too loud. It's water resistant, but only if the rubber/silicone enclosure and flap doesn't become compromised.

reviews.title: Awesome Speaker
reviews.text: I’ve taken this into the shower, to pools, on hikes, and more and it’s in exactly the same shape and condition. It’s held up extremely well, and it is waterproof enough that I’ve had it entirely submerged with no trouble at all! Even dropped it in a sink full of soapy water with no problems to the speaker. Best speaker I own.
